challenges from climate change.

# 4
## Adaptation Strategies for Temperate Fruit Trees

Author: Michael Brown

Adaptation strategies range from breeding for heat tolerance to changing
production zones, adjusting harvest timing, and adopting protected
cultivation systems.

## Sustainable Production Systems

Author: Lisa White

Sustainable production systems balance productivity with environmental
considerations and long-term viability of orchard operations.
